CustomField.formula: 'Trading Value: $' + Text(round(leaseworks__Aircraft_Trading_Value__c/1000000,1)) + 'M; ' + 'Total cash flows: $' + Text(round(leaseworks__Total_Cash_Flows__c/1000000,1)) + 'M; ' + 'GAAP Gain/(Loss) on Sale: $' + Text(round(leaseworks__GAAP_Gain_Loss_on_Sale__c/1000000,1)) + 'M; ' + 'Income: $' + Text(round(leaseworks__Income_Statement_Impact__c/1000000,1)) + 'M'
CustomField.label: Value To Sell
